metadata.text:
Interview Hub is a platform that helps users prepare for technical interviews.
It covers topics like algorithms, data structures, system design, and behavioral questions.
The platform offers practice problems, mock interviews, and personalized feedback.
Our mission is to help students land their dream jobs in tech.

Interview Hub is a platform that helps users prepare for technical interviews.
It covers topics like algorithms, data structures, system design, and behavioral questions.
The platform offers practice problems, mock interviews, and personalized feedback.
Our mission is to help students land their dream jobs in tech.

Project Name 
AI Interview Hub 
Overview 
AI Interview Hub is an AI-powered interview preparation platform that helps students, freshers, 
experienced professionals, and career changers get ready for job interviews across all domains and 
industries. The platform offers realistic AI-driven mock interviews, instant feedback, 50+ domains, 
affordable pricing, and performance tracking. 
Key Features 
• Mock Interviews – Voice-based, AI-conducted interviews tailored to your chosen domain, 
tech st

ack, difficulty level, and time limit. After the interview, you receive a score and 
improvement suggestions. You can download a PDF of the questions and your answers. 
• MCQ Tests – Domain-specific multiple-choice tests for programming languages and other 
subjects. After completion, you see your score. 
• Resources Module – Curated external resources including video series, articles, and 
questions to help you gain knowledge. 
• Resume Analyzer – AI evaluates your resume (ATS-based) and provid

es improvement 
suggestions. Also, AI can take an interview based on your resume and a provided job 
description, then generate a score. 
• Job Search (Premium plan) – Access to job listings collected from external platforms (Adzuna 
API). You can apply for jobs directly. 
• Dashboard – After login, view all recent activities and progress per domain. 
• Feedback Form – Submit your feedback to the team. 
• Contact Support – Reach out via email: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
Supported Domains (Pa

rtial List) 
• Business & Management: Accounting, Finance, HR, Marketing, Project Management, 
Operations Management 
• Science & Research: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Environmental Science 
• Social Sciences & Humanities: Psychology, Sociology, History, Political Science 
• Professional Skills: Communication, Leadership, Critical Thinking, Data Analysis, 
Entrepreneurship 
• Other Domains: Law & Ethics, Education, Healthcare/Nursing, Retail/Customer Service 
• Technology / IT: Programming (Jav

a, Python, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, 
TypeScript), Web (HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Angular, Spring Boot), Databases (MySQL, 
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), DevOps/Cloud (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure/GCP), 
AI/Data Science (ML, Deep Learning, Data Science, NLP, Computer Vision), Cybersecurity 
(Network Security, Ethical Hacking, Information Security), Blockchain & Emerging Tech 
(Blockchain Basics, Smart Contracts). 

User Workflow 
1. Register – Create an account (email or Go

ogle login). 
2. Login – Use email/password or Google. 
3. Dashboard – See recent activities. 
4. Access Services – Mock interview, MCQ test, resources (all free and unlimited), resume 
analyzer (premium), job search (premium). 
Free Services (Always Free, Unlimited) 
• Mock interviews (voice-based) 
• MCQ tests 
• Resources (external links) 
Premium Services (Subscription, ₹99 or ₹299, valid 30 days) 
• ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis (ATS score + suggestions) + one job-description-based mock 
int

erview. 
• ₹299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance analytics. 
• Payment methods: Credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking 
(secure gateway). 
• No refunds or cashback after payment. 
• After 30 days, premium access expires; you can continue using free services. 
Technical Details 
• Platform: Web application (currently works on laptops/desktops, not optimized for mobile). 
• Browsers supported: Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest version

s). Safari works but voice features 
may be limited. 
• Voice input: Fully voice-based – you speak your answers, AI transcribes and evaluates. 
• Language: English only. 
• Data privacy: Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. 
Additional Policies 
• No job guarantee – We do not guarantee placement. Job listings are provided via Adzuna 
API as an additional resource. 
• No certificates – AI Interview Hub is a preparation platform, not a certification body. 
• Discounts – No

discounts currently available, but offers may be introduced in the future. 
• Skip questions – You can skip a question during a mock interview, but skipping may lower 
your score. 

• Domain practice – You can practice any number of domains. Select the domain before each 
mock interview or test. Progress is tracked separately per domain. 
Forgot Password 
• Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, fill in the details, and you will receive an email at 
your registered email address to reset you

r password. 
Contact & Support 
• For questions, doubts, or support: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
• Contact form available on the website. 
 
     Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) 
1. What is AI Interview Hub? 
AI Interview Hub is an AI-powered platform that helps you prepare for job interviews 
through realistic mock interviews, MCQ tests, resources, resume analysis, and job search 
features. 
2. Who can use AI Interview Hub? 
Anyone preparing for job interviews – students, freshers, experie

nced professionals, and 
career changers. 
3. How do I start using the platform? 
Register an account (email or Google), log in, and you can immediately start using free 
services like mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources. 
4. Is there a mobile app? 
Currently, AI Interview Hub is a web application designed for laptops/desktops. It does not 
work well on mobile phones. 
5. Which browsers are supported? 
Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest versions). Safari works but voice features may be limited.

6. Do I need a subscription to use the platform? 
No. Mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources are completely free and unlimited. Premium 
services (resume analyzer + job search) require a subscription. 
7. What are the subscription plans? 
o ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis + one JD-based mock interview (30 days). 
o ₹299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance 
analytics (30 days). 
8. How do I pay for premium? 
We accept credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, Ph

onePe, Paytm), and net banking through a 
secure payment gateway. 
9. Can I get a refund? 
No, we do not offer refunds or cashback after payment. 

10. What happens after 30 days? 
Your premium access expires, but you can still use all free services. You can re-subscribe if 
you wish. 
11. How does the mock interview work? 
You select your domain, tech stack, difficulty level, and time. AI conducts a voice-based 
interview – you speak your answers. After completion, you receive a score and impro

vement 
points. You can download a PDF of the questions and answers. 
12. Can I skip a question in the mock interview? 
Yes, you can skip. However, skipping may lower your score. It’s better to attempt an answer. 
13. Is video analysis available? 
Not at this time. The mock interview is voice-based only. Video analysis may come in a 
future update. 
14. Does the platform offer certificates? 
No. AI Interview Hub is a preparation tool, not a certification provider. We help you train 
and build co

nfidence for real interviews. 
15. Do you guarantee a job? 
No, we do not guarantee job placement. Job listings are provided via Adzuna API as a 
resource to help your job search. 
16. How do I reset my password? 
Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your details, and an email will be sent to 
your registered email address to reset the password. 
17. What languages are supported? 
Currently, only English. 
18. Is my data private? 
Yes. Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for

evaluation. We do not share your 
personal data. 
19. How do I give feedback? 
Use the feedback form on the website. We appreciate your input! 
20. How can I contact support? 
Email us at support@aiinterviewmentor.com or use the contact form on our website. 
21. Are there any discounts? 
No active discounts right now, but exciting offers may be coming soon. Stay tuned! 
22. Can I practice multiple domains? 
Yes. Before each mock interview or test, you can select a domain. Progress is tracked 
s

eparately per domain. 
23. What is the resume analyzer? 
An AI tool that scans your resume (ATS-based) and provides suggestions for improvement. In 
the premium plan, it also conducts an interview based on your resume and a job description, 
then gives a score. 

24. What is the job search feature? 
Available in the ₹299 plan. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API) so 
you can find and apply for relevant jobs.

Project Name 
AI Interview Hub 
Quick Definition 
AI Interview Hub is an AI-powered mock interview and skill assessment platform for job seekers. It 
helps students, freshers, experienced professionals, and career changers get ready for job 
interviews across all domains and industries. 
Overview 
AI Interview Hub is an AI-powered interview preparation platform that offers realistic AI-driven 
mock interviews, instant feedback, 50+ domains, affordable pricing, and performance tracking. 
Key Fe

atures 
• Mock Interviews – Voice-based, AI-conducted interviews tailored to your chosen domain, 
tech stack, difficulty level, and time limit. After the interview, you receive a score and 
improvement suggestions. You can download a PDF of the questions and your answers. 
• MCQ Tests – Domain-specific multiple-choice tests for programming languages and other 
subjects. After completion, you see your score. 
• Resources Module – Curated external resources including video series, articles, and 
q

uestions to help you gain knowledge. 
• Resume Analyzer – AI evaluates your resume (ATS-based) and provides improvement 
suggestions. Also, AI can take an interview based on your resume and a provided job 
description, then generate a score. 
• Job Search (Premium plan) – Access to job listings collected from external platforms 
(Adzuna API). You can apply for jobs directly. 
• Dashboard – After login, view all recent activities and progress per domain. 
• Feedback Form – Submit your feedback to

the team. 
• Contact Support – Reach out via email: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
Supported Domains (50+) 
• Business & Management: Accounting, Finance, HR, Marketing, Project Management, 
Operations Management 
• Science & Research: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Environmental Science 
• Social Sciences & Humanities: Psychology, Sociology, History, Political Science 
• Professional Skills: Communication, Leadership, Critical Thinking, Data Analysis, 
Entrepreneurship 
• Other Domains: Law & Eth

ics, Education, Healthcare/Nursing, Retail/Customer Service 
• Technology / IT: Programming (Java, Python, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, 
TypeScript), Web (HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Angular, Spring Boot), Databases (MySQL, 
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), DevOps/Cloud (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/Azure/GCP), 

AI/Data Science (ML, Deep Learning, Data Science, NLP, Computer Vision), Cybersecurity 
(Network Security, Ethical Hacking, Information Security), Blockchain & Emerging Tech 
(B

lockchain Basics, Smart Contracts) 
User Workflow 
1. Register – Create an account using email or Google login. 
2. Login – Use email/password or Google. 
3. Dashboard – See recent activities and progress per domain. 
4. Access Services – Mock interview, MCQ test, resources (all free and unlimited), resume 
analyzer (premium), job search (premium). 
Free Services (Always Free, Unlimited) 
• Mock interviews (voice-based) 
• MCQ tests 
• Resources (external links) 
Premium Services (Subscription,

Valid 30 Days) 
• ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis (ATS score + suggestions) + one job-description-based mock 
interview. 
• ₹299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance 
analytics. 
• Payment methods: Credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking 
(secure gateway). 
• No refunds or cashback after payment. 
• After 30 days, premium access expires; you can continue using free services. 
Job Application & Subscription – Important Clarification 
• T

he job search feature (listings from Adzuna API) is available ONLY in the ₹299 premium 
plan. 
• You MUST have an active ₹299 subscription to view and apply for jobs through our 
platform. 
• Free users and ₹99 plan users cannot access job listings. 
No Job Guarantee – Explicit Statement 
We do NOT guarantee that you will get a job by using AI Interview Hub. Job listings are provided 
as an additional resource. Success depends on your own skills and preparation. 
Technical Details 
• Platform: W

eb application (currently works on laptops/desktops, not optimized for 
mobile). 

• Browsers supported: Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest versions). Safari works but voice 
features may be limited. 
• Voice input: Fully voice-based – you speak your answers, AI transcribes and evaluates. 
• Language: English only. 
• Data privacy: Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. 
Interview Categorization 
Mock interviews are categorized based on: 
• Domain (e.g., Technology, Business, Sc

ience) 
• Tech stack or subject (e.g., Java, Marketing, Physics) 
• Difficulty level: Easy, Medium, Hard 
• Duration: 15 minutes, 30 minutes, or 45 minutes 
Platform Access 
The platform is a web application that works on laptops and desktops using Chrome, Edge, or 
Firefox (latest versions). It is not optimized for mobile phones. 
Ratings & Feedback 
We do not display public ratings yet. However, users can submit feedback through the feedback 
form on our website. All feedback is reviewed to im

prove the platform. 
Additional Policies 
• No certificates – AI Interview Hub is a preparation platform, not a certification body. 
• Discounts – No discounts currently available, but offers may be introduced in the future. 
• Skip questions – You can skip a question during a mock interview, but skipping may lower 
your score. 
• Domain practice – You can practice any number of domains. Select the domain before 
each mock interview or test. Progress is tracked separately per domain. 
Forgot Pas

sword 
Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, fill in the details, and you will receive an email at your 
registered email address to reset your password. 
Contact & Support 
• For questions, doubts, or support: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
• Contact form available on the website. 
 
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) 

Q: What is AI Interview Hub? 
A: AI Interview Hub is an AI-powered mock interview and skill assessment platform for job 
seekers. 
Q: Who can use AI Interview Hub? 
A: Anyone

preparing for job interviews – students, freshers, experienced professionals, and career 
changers. 
Q: How do I start using the platform? 
A: Register an account (email or Google), log in, and you can immediately start using free services 
like mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources. 
Q: Is there a mobile app? 
A: Currently, AI Interview Hub is a web application designed for laptops/desktops. It does not 
work well on mobile phones. 
Q: Which browsers are supported? 
A: Chrome, Edge, Firefo

x (latest versions). Safari works but voice features may be limited. 
Q: Do I need a subscription to use the platform? 
A: No. Mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources are completely free and unlimited. Premium 
services (resume analyzer + job search) require a subscription. 
Q: What are the subscription plans? 
A: - ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis + one JD-based mock interview (30 days). 
• ₹299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance analytics 
(30 days). 
Q: Do

I need a subscription to apply for jobs? 
A: Yes. Only the ₹299 plan includes job search and application features. Free users cannot access 
job listings. 
Q: Does AI Interview Hub guarantee a job? 
A: No. We provide preparation tools and job listings, but we do not guarantee employment. 
Q: How are interviews categorized? 
A: By domain, tech stack, difficulty (easy/medium/hard), and duration (15/30/45 min). 
Q: Where can I take tests? 
A: On our web platform using a laptop/desktop with Chrome,

Edge, or Firefox. 
Q: Does the platform have user ratings? 
A: Not yet. We collect feedback via our feedback form. 
Q: How do I pay for premium? 
A: We accept credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), and net banking through a 
secure payment gateway. 
Q: Can I get a refund? 
A: No, we do not offer refunds or cashback after payment. 

Q: What happens after 30 days? 
A: Your premium access expires, but you can still use all free services. You can re-subscribe if you 
wish. 
Q: How do

es the mock interview work? 
A: You select your domain, tech stack, difficulty level, and time. AI conducts a voice-based 
interview – you speak your answers. After completion, you receive a score and improvement 
points. You can download a PDF of the questions and answers. 
Q: Can I skip a question in the mock interview? 
A: Yes, you can skip. However, skipping may lower your score. It’s better to attempt an answer. 
Q: Is video analysis available? 
A: Not at this time. The mock interview is vo

ice-based only. Video analysis may come in a future 
update. 
Q: Does the platform offer certificates? 
A: No. AI Interview Hub is a preparation tool, not a certification provider. We help you train and 
build confidence for real interviews. 
Q: How do I reset my password? 
A: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your details, and an email will be sent to your 
registered email address to reset the password. 
Q: What languages are supported? 
A: Currently, only English. 
Q: Is my dat

a private? 
A: Yes. Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. We do not share your 
personal data. 
Q: How do I give feedback? 
A: Use the feedback form on the website. We appreciate your input! 
Q: How can I contact support? 
A: Email us at support@aiinterviewmentor.com or use the contact form on our website. 
Q: Are there any discounts? 
A: No active discounts right now, but exciting offers may be coming soon. Stay tuned! 
Q: Can I practice multiple domains? 
A: Yes. Before

each mock interview or test, you can select a domain. Progress is tracked separately 
per domain. 
Q: What is the resume analyzer? 
A: An AI tool that scans your resume (ATS-based) and provides suggestions for improvement. In 
the premium plan, it also conducts an interview based on your resume and a job description, then 
gives a score. 
Q: What is the job search feature? 
A: Available only in the ₹299 plan. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API) so 
you can find and apply

for relevant jobs. 

Q: How many domains are available? 
A: 50+ domains covering Business, Science, Technology, Humanities, and more. 
Q: Is Java available? 
A: Yes, Java is available under the Programming category. 
Q: How to get help? 
A: Use the contact form on our website or email support@aiinterviewmentor.com.

Project Name 
AI Interview Hub 
 
Quick Definition 
AI Interview Hub is an AI‑powered mock interview and skill assessment platform for job seekers. It 
helps students, freshers, experienced professionals, and career changers get ready for job 
interviews across all domains and industries. 
 
Overview 
AI Interview Hub is an AI‑powered interview preparation platform that offers realistic AI‑driven 
mock interviews, instant feedback, 50+ domains, affordable pricing, and performance tracking.

Free Services – Unlimited After Login 
Once you register and log in, you can use the following services **unlimited times, completely 
free**: 
- Mock interviews (voice‑based) 
- MCQ tests 
- Resources (external links) 
 
No subscription is required for these free services. They remain available even after any premium 
subscription expires. 
 
Premium Services (Subscription, Valid 30 Days) 
- ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis (ATS score + suggestions) + one job‑description‑based mock 
interview. 
- ₹

299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance analytics. 
- Payment methods: Credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking (secure 
gateway). 
- No refunds or cashback after payment. 
- After 30 days, premium access expires; you can continue using all free services. 
 
Job Search Feature – Important Clarification 
- AI Interview Hub does **not** provide jobs directly. 

- We **collect job listings** from external platforms using the Adzuna API.

- With the **₹299 premium plan**, you can search for jobs, view listings, and apply for them. 
- When you apply, your application goes directly to the external employer – not through AI 
Interview Hub. 
- Free users and ₹99 plan users **cannot access** job listings. 
 
No Job Guarantee 
We do **not** guarantee that you will get a job by using AI Interview Hub. Job listings are 
provided as an additional resource. Success depends on your own skills and preparation. 
 
Free Trial 
We currently d

o not offer a free trial for premium services. However, you can explore all free 
services (mock interviews, MCQ tests, resources) without any time limit after logging in. 
 
Key Features 
- Mock Interviews – Voice‑based, AI‑conducted interviews tailored to your chosen domain, tech 
stack, difficulty level, and time limit. After the interview, you receive a score and improvement 
suggestions. You can download a PDF of the questions and your answers. 
- MCQ Tests – Domain‑specific multiple‑choice

tests for programming languages and other 
subjects. After completion, you see your score. 
- Resources Module – Curated external resources including video series, articles, and questions to 
help you gain knowledge. 
- Resume Analyzer – AI evaluates your resume (ATS‑based) and provides improvement 
suggestions. Also, AI can take an interview based on your resume and a provided job description, 
then generate a score. 
- Job Search (₹299 plan only) – Access to job listings collected from Adzuna

API. You can apply for 
jobs directly with external employers. 
- Dashboard – After login, view all recent activities and progress per domain. 
- Feedback Form – Submit your feedback to the team. 
- Contact Support – Reach out via email: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
 
Supported Domains (50+) 
- Business & Management: Accounting, Finance, HR, Marketing, Project Management, Operations 
Management 
- Science & Research: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Environmental Science 

- Social Sciences & Hum

anities: Psychology, Sociology, History, Political Science 
- Professional Skills: Communication, Leadership, Critical Thinking, Data Analysis, 
Entrepreneurship 
- Other Domains: Law & Ethics, Education, Healthcare/Nursing, Retail/Customer Service 
- Technology / IT: Programming (Java, Python, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, 
TypeScript), Web (HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Angular, Spring Boot), Databases (MySQL, 
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), DevOps/Cloud (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/Az

ure/GCP), AI/Data 
Science (ML, Deep Learning, Data Science, NLP, Computer Vision), Cybersecurity (Network 
Security, Ethical Hacking, Information Security), Blockchain & Emerging Tech (Blockchain Basics, 
Smart Contracts) 
 
User Workflow 
1. Register – Create an account using email or Google login. 
2. Login – Use email/password or Google. 
3. Dashboard – See recent activities and progress per domain. 
4. Access Services – Mock interview, MCQ test, resources (free, unlimited), resume analyzer

(premium), job search (₹299 plan). 
 
Technical Details 
- Platform: Web application (currently works on laptops/desktops, not optimized for mobile). 
- Browsers supported: Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest versions). Safari works but voice features may 
be limited. 
- Voice input: Fully voice‑based – you speak your answers, AI transcribes and evaluates. 
- Language: English only. 
- Data privacy: Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. 
 
Interview Categorization 
Mock intervi

ews are categorized based on: 
- Domain (e.g., Technology, Business, Science) 
- Tech stack or subject (e.g., Java, Marketing, Physics) 
- Difficulty level: Easy, Medium, Hard 
- Duration: 15 minutes, 30 minutes, or 45 minutes 
 
Platform Access 

The platform is a web application that works on laptops and desktops using Chrome, Edge, or 
Firefox (latest versions). It is not optimized for mobile phones. 
 
Ratings & Feedback 
We do not display public ratings yet. However, users can submit feedba

ck through the feedback 
form on our website. All feedback is reviewed to improve the platform. 
 
Additional Policies 
- No certificates – AI Interview Hub is a preparation platform, not a certification body. 
- Discounts – No discounts currently available, but offers may be introduced in the future. 
- Skip questions – You can skip a question during a mock interview, but skipping may lower your 
score. 
- Domain practice – You can practice any number of domains. Select the domain before each m

ock 
interview or test. Progress is tracked separately per domain. 
 
Forgot Password 
Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, fill in the details, and you will receive an email at your 
registered email address to reset your password. 
 
Contact & Support 
- For questions, doubts, or support: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
- Contact form available on the website. 
 
---

ication provider. We help you train and

he feedback form on the website. We appreciate your input!

hat scans your resume (ATS‑based) and provides suggestions for improvement. In

A: Available only in the ₹299 plan. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API) so

A: 50+ domains covering Business, Science, Technolog

y, Humanities, and more.

A: We currently do not offer a free trial for premium services. However, all free services (mock

rviews across all domains and industries.

mock interviews, instant feedback, 50+ domains, affordable pricing, and performance tracking.

Free Services – Unlimited After Login 
Once you register and log in, you can use the following services **unlimited times, completely 
free**: 
- Mock interviews (voice‑based) 
- MCQ tests 
- Resources (external links) 
 
No subscription is required

for these free services. They remain available even after any premium 
subscription expires. 
 
Premium Services (Subscription, Valid 30 Days) 
- ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis (ATS score + suggestions) + one job‑description‑based mock 
interview. 
- ₹

299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance analytics. 
- Payment methods: Credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), net banking (secure 
gateway). 
- No refunds or cashback after payment. 
- After 30 day

s, premium access expires; you can continue using all free services. 
 
Job Search Feature – Important Clarification 
- AI Interview Hub does **not** provide jobs directly. 

- We **collect job listings** from external platforms using the Adzuna API.

- With the **₹299 premium plan**, you can search for jobs, view listings, and apply for them. 
- When you apply, your application goes directly to the external employer – not through AI 
Interview Hub. 
- Free users and ₹99 plan users **cannot acce

ss** job listings. 
 
No Job Guarantee 
We do **not** guarantee that you will get a job by using AI Interview Hub. Job listings are 
provided as an additional resource. Success depends on your own skills and preparation. 
 
Free Trial 
We currently d

o not offer a free trial for premium services. However, you can explore all free 
services (mock interviews, MCQ tests, resources) without any time limit after logging in. 
 
Key Features 
- Mock Interviews – Voice‑based, AI‑conducted interviews tail

ored to your chosen domain, tech 
stack, difficulty level, and time limit. After the interview, you receive a score and improvement 
suggestions. You can download a PDF of the questions and your answers. 
- MCQ Tests – Domain‑specific multiple‑choice

tests for programming languages and other 
subjects. After completion, you see your score. 
- Resources Module – Curated external resources including video series, articles, and questions to 
help you gain knowledge. 
- Resume Analyzer – AI evaluate

s your resume (ATS‑based) and provides improvement 
suggestions. Also, AI can take an interview based on your resume and a provided job description, 
then generate a score. 
- Job Search (₹299 plan only) – Access to job listings collected from Adzuna

API. You can apply for 
jobs directly with external employers. 
- Dashboard – After login, view all recent activities and progress per domain. 
- Feedback Form – Submit your feedback to the team. 
- Contact Support – Reach out via email: support@aii

nterviewmentor.com 
 
Supported Domains (50+) 
- Business & Management: Accounting, Finance, HR, Marketing, Project Management, Operations 
Management 
- Science & Research: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Environmental Science 

- Social Sciences & Hum

anities: Psychology, Sociology, History, Political Science 
- Professional Skills: Communication, Leadership, Critical Thinking, Data Analysis, 
Entrepreneurship 
- Other Domains: Law & Ethics, Education, Healthcare/Nursing, Retail/Customer Service

- Technology / IT: Programming (Java, Python, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, 
TypeScript), Web (HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Angular, Spring Boot), Databases (MySQL, 
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis), DevOps/Cloud (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/Az

ure/GCP), AI/Data 
Science (ML, Deep Learning, Data Science, NLP, Computer Vision), Cybersecurity (Network 
Security, Ethical Hacking, Information Security), Blockchain & Emerging Tech (Blockchain Basics, 
Smart Contracts) 
 
User Workflow 
1. Regist

er – Create an account using email or Google login. 
2. Login – Use email/password or Google. 
3. Dashboard – See recent activities and progress per domain. 
4. Access Services – Mock interview, MCQ test, resources (free, unlimited), resume analyzer

(premium), job search (₹299 plan). 
 
Technical Details 
- Platform: Web application (currently works on laptops/desktops, not optimized for mobile). 
- Browsers supported: Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest versions). Safari works but voice features may

be limited. 
- Voice input: Fully voice‑based – you speak your answers, AI transcribes and evaluates. 
- Language: English only. 
- Data privacy: Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. 
 
Interview Categorization 
Mock intervi

ews are categorized based on: 
- Domain (e.g., Technology, Business, Science) 
- Tech stack or subject (e.g., Java, Marketing, Physics) 
- Difficulty level: Easy, Medium, Hard 
- Duration: 15 minutes, 30 minutes, or 45 minutes 
 
Platform Access 

Th

e platform is a web application that works on laptops and desktops using Chrome, Edge, or 
Firefox (latest versions). It is not optimized for mobile phones. 
 
Ratings & Feedback 
We do not display public ratings yet. However, users can submit feedba

ck through the feedback 
form on our website. All feedback is reviewed to improve the platform. 
 
Additional Policies 
- No certificates – AI Interview Hub is a preparation platform, not a certification body. 
- Discounts – No discounts currently av

ailable, but offers may be introduced in the future. 
- Skip questions – You can skip a question during a mock interview, but skipping may lower your 
score. 
- Domain practice – You can practice any number of domains. Select the domain before each m

ock 
interview or test. Progress is tracked separately per domain. 
 
Forgot Password 
Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, fill in the details, and you will receive an email at your 
registered email address to reset your password. 
 
Contact

& Support 
- For questions, doubts, or support: support@aiinterviewmentor.com 
- Contact form available on the website.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) 
 
Q: What is AI Interview Hub? 
A: AI Interview Hub is an AI‑powered mock interview an

d skill assessment platform for job 
seekers. 
 
Q: Who can use AI Interview Hub? 

A: Anyone preparing for job interviews – students, freshers, experienced professionals, and career 
changers. 
 
Q: How do I start using the platform? 
A: Register an

account (email or Google), log in, and you can immediately start using free services 
like mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources – unlimited, no subscription needed. 
 
Q: Is there a mobile app? 
A: Currently, AI Interview Hub is a web applicati

on designed for laptops/desktops. It does not 
work well on mobile phones. 
 
Q: Which browsers are supported? 
A: Chrome, Edge, Firefox (latest versions). Safari works but voice features may be limited. 
 
Q: Do I need a subscription to use the plat

form? 
A: No. Mock interviews, MCQ tests, and resources are completely free and unlimited after login. 
Premium services (resume analyzer + job search) require a subscription. 
 
Q: What are the subscription plans? 
A: - ₹99 plan: AI resume analysis

+ one JD‑based mock interview (30 days). 
   - ₹299 plan: Unlimited resume analyzer + job search via Adzuna API + performance analytics (30 
days). 
 
Q: Do I need a subscription to apply for jobs? 
A: Yes. Only the ₹299 plan includes job search and

application features. Free users cannot access 
job listings. 
 
Q: Does AI Interview Hub provide jobs? 
A: No. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API). You apply directly to the 
external employer. 
 
Q: Does AI Interview Hub gu

arantee a job? 
A: No. We provide preparation tools and job listings, but we do not guarantee employment. 

 
Q: How are interviews categorized? 
A: By domain, tech stack, difficulty (easy/medium/hard), and duration (15/30/45 min). 
 
Q: Where can I

take tests? 
A: On our web platform using a laptop/desktop with Chrome, Edge, or Firefox. 
 
Q: Does the platform have user ratings? 
A: Not yet. We collect feedback via our feedback form. 
 
Q: How do I pay for premium? 
A: We accept credit/debit ca

rds, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), and net banking through a 
secure payment gateway. 
 
Q: Can I get a refund? 
A: No, we do not offer refunds or cashback after payment. 
 
Q: What happens after 30 days? 
A: Your premium access expires, but you

can still use all free services. You can re‑subscribe if you 
wish. 
 
Q: How does the mock interview work? 
A: You select your domain, tech stack, difficulty level, and time. AI conducts a voice‑based 
interview – you speak your answers. After compl

etion, you receive a score and improvement 
points. You can download a PDF of the questions and answers. 
 
Q: Can I skip a question in the mock interview? 
A: Yes, you can skip. However, skipping may lower your score. It’s better to attempt an answe

r. 
 
Q: Is video analysis available? 
A: Not at this time. The mock interview is voice‑based only. Video analysis may come in a future 
update. 
 

Q: Does the platform offer certificates? 
A: No. AI Interview Hub is a preparation tool, not a certif

ication provider. We help you train and 
build confidence for real interviews. 
 
Q: How do I reset my password? 
A: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your details, and an email will be sent to your 
registered email address to reset t

he password. 
 
Q: What languages are supported? 
A: Currently, only English. 
 
Q: Is my data private? 
A: Yes. Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. We do not share your 
personal data. 
 
Q: How do I give feedback? 
A: Use t

he feedback form on the website. We appreciate your input! 
 
Q: How can I contact support? 
A: Email us at support@aiinterviewmentor.com or use the contact form on our website. 
 
Q: Are there any discounts? 
A: No active discounts right now, but ex

citing offers may be coming soon. Stay tuned! 
 
Q: Can I practice multiple domains? 
A: Yes. Before each mock interview or test, you can select a domain. Progress is tracked separately 
per domain. 
 
Q: What is the resume analyzer? 
A: An AI tool t

hat scans your resume (ATS‑based) and provides suggestions for improvement. In 
the premium plan, it also conducts an interview based on your resume and a job description, then 
gives a score. 
 

Q: What is the job search feature? 
A: Available only

in the ₹299 plan. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API) so 
you can find and apply for relevant jobs. We do not provide jobs directly. 
 
Q: How many domains are available? 
A: 50+ domains covering Business, Science, Technolog

y, Humanities, and more. 
 
Q: Is Java available? 
A: Yes, Java is available under the Programming category. 
 
Q: Is there a free trial? 
A: We currently do not offer a free trial for premium services. However, all free services (mock 
interviews, M

CQ tests, resources) are available unlimited after login. 
 
Q: How to get help? 
A: Use the contact form on our website or email support@aiinterviewmentor.com.

A: By domain, tech stack, difficulty (easy/medium/hard), and duration (15/30/45 min). 
 
Q: Where can I

take tests? 
A: On our web platform using a laptop/desktop with Chrome, Edge, or Firefox. 
 
Q: Does the platform have user ratings? 
A: Not yet. We collect feedback via our feedback form. 
 
Q: How do I pay for premium? 
A: We accept credit/debit ca

rds, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), and net banking through a 
secure payment gateway. 
 
Q: Can I get a refund? 
A: No, we do not offer refunds or cashback after payment. 
 
Q: What happens after 30 days? 
A: Your premium access expires, but you

can still use all free services. You can re‑subscribe if you 
wish. 
 
Q: How does the mock interview work? 
A: You select your domain, tech stack, difficulty level, and time. AI conducts a voice‑based 
interview – you speak your answers. After compl

etion, you receive a score and improvement 
points. You can download a PDF of the questions and answers. 
 
Q: Can I skip a question in the mock interview? 
A: Yes, you can skip. However, skipping may lower your score. It’s better to attempt an answe

r. 
 
Q: Is video analysis available? 
A: Not at this time. The mock interview is voice‑based only. Video analysis may come in a future 
update. 
 

Q: Does the platform offer certificates? 
A: No. AI Interview Hub is a preparation tool, not a certif

ication provider. We help you train and 
build confidence for real interviews. 
 
Q: How do I reset my password? 
A: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your details, and an email will be sent to your 
registered email address to reset t

he password. 
 
Q: What languages are supported? 
A: Currently, only English. 
 
Q: Is my data private? 
A: Yes. Voice recordings are encrypted and used only for evaluation. We do not share your 
personal data. 
 
Q: How do I give feedback? 
A: Use t

he feedback form on the website. We appreciate your input! 
 
Q: How can I contact support? 
A: Email us at support@aiinterviewmentor.com or use the contact form on our website. 
 
Q: Are there any discounts? 
A: No active discounts right now, but ex

citing offers may be coming soon. Stay tuned! 
 
Q: Can I practice multiple domains? 
A: Yes. Before each mock interview or test, you can select a domain. Progress is tracked separately 
per domain. 
 
Q: What is the resume analyzer? 
A: An AI tool t

hat scans your resume (ATS‑based) and provides suggestions for improvement. In 
the premium plan, it also conducts an interview based on your resume and a job description, then 
gives a score. 
 

Q: What is the job search feature? 
A: Available only

in the ₹299 plan. We collect job listings from external platforms (Adzuna API) so 
you can find and apply for relevant jobs. We do not provide jobs directly. 
 
Q: How many domains are available? 
A: 50+ domains covering Business, Science, Technolog

y, Humanities, and more. 
 
Q: Is Java available? 
A: Yes, Java is available under the Programming category. 
 
Q: Is there a free trial? 
A: We currently do not offer a free trial for premium services. However, all free services (mock 
interviews, M

CQ tests, resources) are available unlimited after login. 
 
Q: How to get help? 
A: Use the contact form on our website or email support@aiinterviewmentor.com.
